title: Jeep Wrangler Sahara 4x4
description: A ready-for-anything Wrangler for beach days, mountain roads, and late airport arrivals. Empire preps every rental with cold A/C, a full tank option, and quick WhatsApp support so you can get moving across Sosua without friction.

title: Hyundai Accent City Edition
description: A smart daily driver for airport transfers, short errands, and weekend runs between Sosua, Cabarete, and Puerto Plata. It is fuel efficient, easy to park, and ideal for couples or solo travelers who want straightforward pricing.

title: Kia Sportage Touring SUV
description: A balanced SUV for travelers who need comfort, luggage space, and enough height for the north coast's mixed roads. This option is popular for family trips and longer stays because it gives you room without moving into van pricing.

title: Toyota Hiace Group Van
description: Built for groups, surf crews, and family airport runs with extra luggage. The Hiace keeps everyone together, cuts coordination headaches, and works especially well when your pickup or drop-off schedule changes mid-trip.

title: Chevrolet Camaro Convertible
description: A premium convertible for travelers who want the coast to feel like part of the trip. Best for couples, special weekends, and anyone who wants a sharper-looking handoff at the villa, resort, or airport.
